any.run sandbox detonation — sample 4f8a92b1

Process tree:
  winword.exe (PID 1234)
   └─ cmd.exe (PID 2345)
      └─ powershell.exe (PID 3456)

Command lines:
  cmd.exe /c "powershell -nop -w hidden -enc QQBCAEMARAAxADIAMwA0ADUANgA3ADgAOQBhAGIAYwBkAGUAZgBnAGgAaQBqAGsAbABtAG4AbwBwAHEAcgBzAHQAdQB2AHcAeAB5AHoAQQBCAEMARABlADEAMgAzADQANQA2ADcAOAA="
  schtasks /create /tn "WinUpdater" /tr "C:\ProgramData\loader.exe" /sc minute /mo 5

Registry persistence:
  HKCU\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Run\Updater = "C:\Users\victim\AppData\Roaming\loader.exe"
  HKLM\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Services\WinDefendUpd\ImagePath = "C:\ProgramData\u.exe"

Network IOCs:
  POST https://discord.com/api/webhooks/1234567890/AbCdEf1234567890abcdef1234567890
  GET hxxps://abc123[.]trycloudflare[.]com/payload
  Beacon to 185.220.101.5:443 every 60s

TLS fingerprint:
  JA3=e7d705a3286e19ea42f587b344ee6865
  JA3S: 4835b19f14997673071435cb321f5445
  JARM=2ad2ad0002ad2ad00042d42d000000abcdef1234567890abcdef1234567890
